free_text: Angular-momentum effects in pre-equilibrium processes
A Ge(Li)-NaI anti-Compton spectrometer
was used in coincidence with nine 5.1-cm by 7.6-cm
NaI(Tl) detectors.
Gamma-ray multiplicities; deduced J distributions in
evaporation residues.

The derived cross section is the relative cross
section, normalized to the sum of the cross sections
for 3n,4n and 5n emission channels (1000 mb).
The total production cross sections for the products
corresponding to the evaporation of x neutrons were
determined from the level cross section values
extrapolated to the 0+ ground states in the even
products and to the bandheads in the odd products.
